platformModules.title: Platform Modules
platformModules.subtitle: Manage module availability globally. Click a module for details.
platformModules.iconNameHint: Tabler icon name (e.g. tabler-truck) or image path
platformModules.coreGatePass: Not a core module — passes through
platformModules.sourceGateInfo: Must be in jobdomain's default_modules (or future addon purchase)
platformModules.commercialModeHint: If set to "Paid Add-on", the price configured below is added on top of the company's base subscription plan price.
platformModules.pricingUnitHint: For usage-based or per-user pricing, this defines what is measured.
platformModules.flatMonthlyPrice: Additional monthly price (same for all plans)
platformModules.planFlatPrice: Additional monthly price per subscription plan
platformModules.planFlatHint: This amount is added to the company's selected subscription plan price.
platformModules.includedSeats: Included seats per plan (no additional cost)
platformModules.extraUserPrice: Additional price per extra user (beyond included seats)
platformModules.noRevenueImpact: This module does not generate additional revenue.
platformModules.includedInSubscription: Included in subscription plan. No additional cost.
platformModules.selectPricingStructure: Select a pricing structure to configure add-on pricing.
platformModules.noCompaniesUsingModule: No companies are currently using this module.
platformModules.bundlesDescription: Bundles group permissions for role templates. They are defined in code and read-only.
platformModules.notIncludedByDefault: Not included by default in any job domain.
platformModules.noDependents: No modules depend on this one.

platformJobdomains.title: Job Domains
platformJobdomains.codeHint: Lowercase, underscores only. Immutable after creation.
platformJobdomains.confirmDeleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete the job domain {name}? This action cannot be undone.
platformJobdomains.allowCustomFields: Allow companies to create custom fields

platformJobdomains.presetInfo: These presets are applied only when assigning this job domain to a company. Existing companies are not affected.
platformJobdomains.coreModulesInfo: Always active for all companies. Cannot be removed.
platformJobdomains.includedByDefaultInfo: Auto-activated when this job domain is assigned.

platformJobdomains.incompatibleModulesInfo: Not available for this job domain.

session.title: Session Governance
session.subtitle: Configure session timeout, keepalive, and warning behavior for all users.
session.idleTimeoutHint: Session expires after this many minutes of inactivity. Min: 5, Max: 1440 (24h).
session.warningThresholdHint: Show expiration warning this many minutes before timeout.
session.heartbeatIntervalHint: How often the client checks session status with the server.
session.rememberMeDurationHint: How long the 'Remember Me' token stays valid.
session.rememberMeNotice: Remember Me will be available with the upcoming authentication upgrade (Passport/Sanctum).
session.mustBeLessThanTimeout: Must be less than idle timeout.

theme.title: Platform Theme Settings
theme.subtitle: Configure the global UI appearance for all users. Changes are previewed live.
theme.livePreviewNotice: Changes are previewed live. Click Save to persist for all users.

maintenance.ipAllowlistDesc: IPs in this list can bypass maintenance mode.
maintenance.ipAlreadyInList: Your IP is already in the allowlist.
maintenance.mailingListHint: Slug of the mailing list for 'Notify me' subscriptions.

landing.heroSubtitle: All your clients, team, operations, and growth — in one place. The workspace your business deserves.
landing.everythingYouNeed: Everything you need to run your business
landing.stopJuggling: Stop juggling between tools. One workspace to manage your day-to-day, your team, and your growth.
landing.manageClientsDesc: Keep all your contacts, history, and interactions organized in one place.
landing.organizeTeamDesc: Assign roles, manage access, and keep everyone aligned on what matters.
landing.trackOperationsDesc: Follow orders, shipments, and tasks from start to finish with full visibility.
landing.customizeWorkspaceDesc: Adapt the interface, branding, and features to match how you work.
landing.stayInControlDesc: Secure access, session management, and permissions — you decide who sees what.
landing.growWithConfidenceDesc: Add team members, services, and locations as your business expands.
landing.builtForRealDesc: Whether you run a delivery company, a beauty salon, or a growing team — the workspace adapts to your activity.
landing.modernInterfaceDesc: A clean, intuitive workspace designed for daily use — not a cluttered dashboard.
landing.flexibleByDesignDesc: Activate only what you need. Your workspace adapts to your activity, not the other way around.
landing.reliableSecureDesc: Your data stays protected. Role-based access, encrypted sessions, and full control over your account.
landing.designedForGrowthDesc: Start small and scale up. Add people, features, and locations without starting over.
landing.readyToTakeControl: Ready to take control of your business?
landing.createInMinutes: Create your workspace in minutes. No credit card required.
